creator: weldon@excelsus.com
text:
Spontaneous reboot with no other indication in logs except for message
on reboot.  Please let me know if you want the savecore.  I did check
to see if there was a report already on this, forgive me if I miss it.
If this is solved in a more current version, please let me know.  We
already plan to install 7.0-RELEASE when it is available.

Thanks!

Feb  1 12:30:59 netflow-dc2 savecore: reboot after panic: solaris assert: arc_buf_remove_ref(db->db_buf, db) == 0, file: /usr/src/sy
s/modules/zfs/../../contrib/opensolaris/uts/common/fs/zfs/dbuf.c, line: 1718
